title: Segmentation fault in Handshake buffer insertion

features.name: handshake control_merge with unconsumed index result
features.description: Code should include a handshake.control_merge operation producing a multi-value result (none, index) where the index result has no downstream users, exposing the pass's failure to guard against zero-user results during buffer insertion

features.name: handshake func with partial multi-output op consumption
features.description: Code should include a handshake.func where a multi-result operation (such as control_merge returning (none, index)) has only a subset of its results forwarded to handshake.return, leaving remaining results with no users when the cycles buffer strategy runs
